criterion_selection.question: To accurately diagnose premature atrial complexes, which of the following diagnostic criteria should be evaluated?
options: Presence of a fixed, rigid heart rate without variability
Presence of an irregularly irregular ventricular rhythm
Presence of intermittent ventricular pauses (dropped beats)

finding.question: Regading the criterion you selected, are there any premature beats on this ECG, where a QRS complex occurs earlier than expected time based on the preceding normal cycles?

decision.question: Based on the finding identified above, does this patient have premature atrial complex(es)?
options: Further findings are required to confirm the diagnosis
